observations.problem: A stale release-auto-promotion-ready manifest could remain as a passing final authority after preflight, run-ready, preseal, sealed-run, or operator summary inputs were refreshed.
observations.why_it_matters: Operators can accidentally read an old pass verdict even when the current source fingerprint has only lower-stage evidence and final promotion should be blocked or recomputed.
observations.automation_candidate: Invalidate build/release/release-auto-promotion-ready-manifest.json whenever a lower-stage Stage 3 input writer refreshes evidence.
observations.suggested_followup: Implemented in this task: lower-stage writers now call release-auto-promotion-ready-invalidate before refreshing their own authority or diagnostics.

observations.problem: Generated residue cleanup is still mostly manual: some directories are cheap extraction/debug residue, while others are release or learning evidence that should not be blanket-deleted.
observations.why_it_matters: Manual cleanup makes release closeout slower and increases the risk of either deleting provenance evidence or preserving stale noise that later blocks freshness/readiness gates.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a retention-aware cleanup target that removes regenerated extraction/debug residue, detects orphan goal-runtime state trees, and never deletes current release authority sidecars or private corpus roots.
observations.suggested_followup: Implemented in this task: generated-artifact-retention-clean reports allowlisted ignored residue, protects release authority/private/run evidence, and supports explicit apply mode with tests.

observations.problem: refresh-generated-core can rewrite the tracked script-output surface inventory for timestamp or metadata churn even when the semantic output surface did not change.
observations.why_it_matters: A dirty worktree after generated refresh forces an avoidable commit and can block release-run-ready even though no contract behavior changed.
observations.automation_candidate: Make script-output-surfaces promotion semantic-aware, or split volatile generated metadata into an ignored sidecar while keeping the tracked inventory stable.
observations.suggested_followup: Implemented in this task: script-output-surfaces promotion preserves the existing file when only volatile envelope fields changed, with focused regression coverage.

observations.surface: release-auto-promotion-preflight, external-report-action-matrix, auto-improve-readiness queue inputs, generated-artifact-converge
observations.problem: After safe deletion of ignored reports, preflight can fail on missing diagnostic prerequisites before it reaches its intended cheap blocker checks.
observations.why_it_matters: A release operator should not need to remember hidden report bootstrap order for generated evidence that is safe to recreate.
observations.automation_candidate: Introduce a cheap preflight-prerequisite refresh target that recreates missing external-report-action-matrix and auto-improve queue-input reports without running expensive release stages or dirtying tracked files.
observations.suggested_followup: Implemented in this task: release-auto-promotion-preflight-prerequisites refreshes queue-input reports, external-report-action-matrix, and generated-artifact-index before cheap preflight gates.
